chart_type: grayscale 3-shape scatter + 3 fit curves (same gray tones)
method: Same pipeline as el-88, but the fit-curve subtraction (§3b) is essential here: without it, the dotted curves register as phantom open markers. Known limitation: filled gray squares sitting on the solid 27°C fit curve fuse into elongated CCs and are still under-counted.
known_undercount: 27°C squares on the solid 27°C fit curve.
